message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.count (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.count() —
returns a Series indexed by column name with the count of non-null
values per column:

- count_basic: 4-row 2-col frame, one column with 2 nulls
- count_no_nulls: int+float columns with no missing — counts == nrows
- count_all_nulls: every cell null — counts all zero

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.count(axis=0, numeric_only=False) and emits expected_series),
runs the Rust DataFrame.count(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameCount was already wired through
the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-9jtrf]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
